assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.
Developer has internet access and a modern development environment.
Developer can sign up for a Courier account.

developer_goal: Send a notification using Courier's API to verify integration and delivery.

first_success.outcome: A notification message is successfully sent using the API key and appears as delivered in the Courier dashboard logs.
first_success.observable_signal: Message appears in Message Logs with timeline stages: accepted, routed, rendered, sent, and delivered.

route_selection.surface: REST API with SDKs and CLI
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: AI Agent Integration Path
candidates.reason: Present in the machine draft; not selected by an independent shortest-path audit.

candidates.name: Visual Dashboard and Design Studio
candidates.reason: While the visual dashboard and Design Studio are important for content design and lifecycle marketing, the documented first success for developers is sending a notification via the API.

candidates.name: AI Agent Integration via MCP Server and CLI
candidates.reason: Targeted at AI coding agents, this is a specialized integration path rather than the primary onboarding for general developers.

required_path.action: Sign up or log in to Courier dashboard.

required_fields.label: User credentials (email, password, or SSO).
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.action: Copy API key from Settings > API Keys in the dashboard.

required_fields.label: Authenticated dashboard access.
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.action: Set environment variable COURIER_API_KEY with the copied API key.

required_fields.label: API key string.
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.observable_result: Environment variable accessible to SDK or CLI.

required_path.action: Send a notification message using curl, CLI, or SDK with the API key.

required_fields.label: API key, recipient email, message content JSON.
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.observable_result: Response includes a requestId indicating message accepted.

required_path.action: Open Message Logs in Courier dashboard to verify message delivery status.

required_fields.label: RequestId from API response.
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.observable_result: Message shows delivered status in logs.

prerequisites.description: Sign up for a Courier account at https://app.courier.com/signup.
Obtain an API key from the Courier dashboard under Settings > API Keys.
Have a development environment capable of making HTTP requests or running SDKs/CLI (e.g., curl, Node.js, Python).

external_gates.description: User must create a Courier account to obtain API key.
API key is required to authenticate API calls.
Correctly format and send API request with valid recipient and message content.
Access to Courier dashboard Message Logs to verify delivery.

platform_outcomes.description: Send a notification message via the Courier API and verify its delivery in the dashboard logs.
